PassingShip.title: Passing ship
PassingShip.description: Our scanners have detected a ship nearby. It should be within communication range shortly.

PassingShipPhysical.title: Passing ship physical
PassingShipPhysical.description: Our scanners have detected a ship nearby. It should be within communication range shortly.

Asteroids.title: Asteroid field
Asteroids.description: We are passing over an asteroid field. We will need to drop from high burn to access them, though we must be careful of parasites and infections.

Debris.title: Debris
Debris.description: We are detecting some kind of debris nearby, drop from high burn to scavenge the wreckage for supplies or look for survivors. We must be wary of pirates in the area.

CryoChamber.title: Cryo chamber
CryoChamber.description: There appears to be a Cryo Chamber floating close by. We could see if anyone's inside.

PassingShipRescue.title: Passing ship rescue
PassingShipRescue.description: Our scanners have detected a ship nearby. It should be within communication range shortly.

PassingPlanet.title: Passing planet
PassingPlanet.description: A planet has been detected nearby.

PassingStar.title: Passing star
PassingStar.description: A star has been detected nearby.

MayDayPawn.title: Mayday
MayDayPawn.description: You are now too far away to stop and rescue {pawn}.

AbandonedFacility.title: Abandoned facility
AbandonedFacility.description: A facility has been detected in this sector. We should drop out of high burn to investigate.

HostileSwarm.title: Hostile swarm
HostileSwarm.description: The hostile swarm of {pawn}s have now entered this sector.
